requirements: should also have Idea about php.

questions.question: Peter, Paul and Mary share out a certain sum of money between them. Peter gets 2 / 5, Paul gets 0.55 and Mary gets $45.00. How much is the original sum of money?

Aslam rents a car for his marriage. On Monday, he used petrol of Rs. 1,200. On Tuesday and Wednesday, his petrol costs Rs. 1,500 on each day. On Thursday and Friday, the petrol costs him Rs. 1,800. What is the average daily cost for the five days?
Which number appears next in the pattern? 13, 17, 19, 23, ?
What is the value of x in the expression: $64 - 12 times 2 + 6 div 3 = x
Choose similar meaning to LUCRATIVE:

answers.A2: Profitable

questions.key: Profitable

questions.question: Opposite of DIFFIDENT:

answers.A2: Timid

questions.key: Confident

questions.question: Correct: 'The committee ___ decided to postpone.'

answers.A2: has

questions.key: have

questions.question: The philosophy professor's lectures were renowned for their ___ wit and penetrating observations.

answers.A2: trenchant

questions.key: trenchant

questions.question: What is a constructor in OOP?

answers.A1: A method that destroys an object
answers.A2: A special method that initializes an object when it is created
answers.A3: A method that copies an object
answers.A4: A method that makes a class abstract

questions.key: A special method that initializes an object when it is created
questions.justification: A constructor is automatically called when an object is instantiated, used to initialize member variables and set up initial state.

questions.question: What is the Template Method pattern?

answers.A2: A pattern that defines algorithm skeleton in base class, letting derived classes override steps

questions.key: A pattern that defines algorithm skeleton in base class, letting derived classes override steps
questions.justification: Template Method pattern defines algorithm structure in base class, allowing subclasses to customize specific steps.

questions.question: What does 'static' keyword do for member variables?

answers.A2: Makes the variable belong to the class, not instances
answers.A3: Prevents the variable from being used

questions.key: Makes the variable belong to the class, not instances
questions.justification: Static member variables are shared by all instances of the class. There is only one copy regardless of how many objects are created.

questions.question: Sorting in data structures refers to which operation?

answers.A2: Arranging elements in order

questions.key: Arranging elements in order

questions.question: What is AVL tree rotation used for?

answers.A1: To rotate data around the tree
answers.A2: To rebalance tree after insertions/deletions

questions.key: To rebalance tree after insertions/deletions
questions.justification: Rotations maintain AVL tree balance property

questions.question: What is string matching using tries?

answers.A2: Efficient pattern matching using prefix tree structure

questions.key: Efficient pattern matching using prefix tree structure

questions.question: What is a window function?

answers.A2: Function operating on row set within result window

questions.key: Function operating on row set within result window

questions.question: In database design, what is data redundancy?

answers.A2: Unnecessary duplication of data

questions.key: Unnecessary duplication of data

questions.question: What is a query execution plan?

answers.A2: Sequence of operations for executing query

questions.key: Sequence of operations for executing query

questions.question: What is BIC?

answers.A2: TCP optimized for high speed networks

questions.key: TCP optimized for high speed networks

questions.question: What is EIGRP?

answers.A2: Enhanced Interior Gateway Routing Protocol

questions.key: Enhanced Interior Gateway Routing Protocol

questions.question: What is SYN flood?

answers.A2: DoS attack sending many SYN packets

questions.key: DoS attack sending many SYN packets

questions.question: What is window.location used for?

answers.A2: Getting/setting the URL of the current page

questions.key: Getting/setting the URL of the current page
questions.justification: window.location contains the URL and navigation methods.

questions.question: What is the 'mouseover' event?

answers.A1: Triggers when the mouse clicks the element
answers.A2: Triggers when the mouse moves over the element
answers.A3: Triggers when the mouse leaves the element

questions.key: Triggers when the mouse moves over the element
questions.justification: mouseover fires when mouse enters the element area.

questions.question: What does the viewport meta tag do in a web page?

answers.A2: Controls how the page renders on different devices
answers.A3: Sets the title of the page

questions.key: Controls how the page renders on different devices
questions.justification: The viewport meta tag optimizes display for mobile and responsive design.

questions.question: What does AI stand for?

answers.A2: Automated Instruction

questions.key: Artificial Intelligence
questions.justification: AI is the field of computer science aimed at creating intelligent machines.

questions.question: What is a rule-based system?

answers.A2: Percentage of correct predictions
answers.A3: A measure of precision in outcomes

questions.key: System using IF-THEN rules for decision making
questions.justification: Rule-based systems use knowledge encoded as rules.
